author: Advait Jayant
name: 11L LeakyReLU² + Early QAT@0.5 + GPTQ-lite + EMA
blurb: 11-layer 512-dim transformer with LeakyReLU(0.5)² 3x MLPs, early int6 STE-QAT at LR scale 0.5 (~1400 QAT steps vs typical ~1), GPTQ-lite per-row clip search, EMA(0.997), Muon+AdamW WD 0.04, warmdown 3500, stride-64 sliding eval. 3-seed mean 1.1387 (std 0.0005).
